name: football-player-value-v1
description: Resolves binary questions about a football player's value to their club via interpretive synthesis over a tiered evidence dossier (primary on/off splits and team-share metrics, secondary independent scout analysis, tertiary decorative quotes).

citations.description: Optional. Dossier fields the judge leaned on, e.g. 'Pedri.manager_quotes[0]', 'Pedri.scout_notes[1]'.
